about_text: I am a freelancer, Frontend developer, based in Novorossiysk, Russia. I enjoy creating modern, responsive, and intuitive websites and applications that turn your ideas into successful digital products.
about_greetings: Hello! I specialize in creating attractive, responsive, and accessible digital experiences for all types of users. I turn ideas into clean and efficient websites and applications.
about_standards: Pixel-Perfect layout: precisely transferring design from layout to live code.
Interactivity and dynamics: animating interfaces with smooth transitions and fast response.
Absolute responsive: optimizing websites for any screen size.
Clean code under the hood: writing structured code that is easy to maintain and scale.
projects__card-text1: The goal of this project is to implement the client side of the Audio Player application.
projects__card-text2: The goal of this TravelBlog project is to create a web application for communication and experience sharing among travelers.
projects__card-text3: The goal of this project is to create a movie search functionality and ensure the application is simple and user-friendly.
